workItem.title: Treat intentional OTP shutdown as a successful service stop
workItem.body:
<!-- bos:work-item {"acceptanceCriteria":["A controlled supervisor shutdown produces exit status 0","An unexpected termination produces exit status 1","systemd can distinguish planned stop from failure","The complete Symphony gate passes"],"autonomy":"full","context":"A controlled systemctl stop of the idle BOS orchestrator stopped all work safely but left the unit in failed because the CLI mapped the supervisor's normal :shutdown reason to exit code 1.","dependencies":[],"expectedOutcome":"Symphony returns exit code 0 for intentional OTP supervisor shutdown while preserving a non-zero exit for unexpected termination, so planned service maintenance is distinguishable from a crash.","kind":"issue","operationId":"op_symphony_graceful_service_stop_20260721","outOfScope":["Suppress real service crashes","Change systemd restart policy","Treat killed or error reasons as successful"],"parentIssueNumber":null,"risk":"low","scope":["Classify :normal, :shutdown and {:shutdown, reason} as successful CLI termination","Keep unexpected supervisor termination as failure","Add regression coverage for shutdown reason mapping","Document the systemd operational contract","Run the complete Symphony quality gate"],"status":"draft","title":"Treat intentional OTP shutdown as a successful service stop"} -->

## Context

A controlled systemctl stop of the idle BOS orchestrator stopped all work safely but left the unit in failed because the CLI mapped the supervisor's normal :shutdown reason to exit code 1.

## Expected outcome

Symphony returns exit code 0 for intentional OTP supervisor shutdown while preserving a non-zero exit for unexpected termination, so planned service maintenance is distinguishable from a crash.

## Scope

- Classify :normal, :shutdown and {:shutdown, reason} as successful CLI termination
- Keep unexpected supervisor termination as failure
- Add regression coverage for shutdown reason mapping
- Document the systemd operational contract
- Run the complete Symphony quality gate

## Out of scope

- Suppress real service crashes
- Change systemd restart policy
- Treat killed or error reasons as successful

## Acceptance criteria

- A controlled supervisor shutdown produces exit status 0
- An unexpected termination produces exit status 1
- systemd can distinguish planned stop from failure
- The complete Symphony gate passes
